source_pr.title: fix using index and where bug.
source_pr.body:
- Must use a new index plan for index filter, we cannot change origin index spans when used in join next.
- Must check where condition after FROM phase even using index, because outer join may add extra NULL value.

symptoms: r = mustExecSQL(c, se, "select * from t1 left join t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c2 order by t1.c1") (tidb_test.go)
failure_signature: r = mustExecSQL(c, se, "select * from t1 left join t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c2 order by t1.c1") (tidb_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: r = mustExecSQL(c, se, "select * from t1 left join t2 on t1.c1 = t2.c2 order by t1.c1") (tidb_test.go)

analysis:
